mapper.sql: id, quote_no, demand_id, developer_id, price_total, estimated_days, tech_solution, delivery_desc, attach_json, valid_until, status, selected_at, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from `quote` where developer_id = #{developerId} order by id desc
select from `quote` where demand_id = #{demandId} order by id desc
mapper.update: update `quote` set status = 1, selected_at = #{selectedAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
